creator: empty.japan
caption:
I have finally done it! 6 months of research and preparations have led to a new home in the north of Nagano prefecture. 

This definitely marks a new chapter for my life and for this page, for which, by the way, I am the most thankful to all of you guys and to Kyoto. Yes, I owe a lot to Kyoto because that’s where empty.japan was born, but the time has come to move on.

A lot of you asked why I moved, so here are some of the main reasons:

1. It will allow me to create new travel guides in the new areas of Honshu island. No worries, I do plan to create Hokkaido and Kyushu guides eventually as well 😁

2. Absolutely stunning nature: Mountains, hot springs, and the sea just a 50-minute drive away. And on top of that, a slower pace of life in the countryside.

3. Simply wanted to experience local life in another part of Japan.

Honestly, there are a lot more other reasons, but I will share them with you along our next and hopefully exciting chapter! Stay tuned ❤️
